description_long: This is a large, eight-wheeled armored combat vehicle with a low, angular profile and a matte brown exterior. The vehicle features a prominent turret mounted centrally on the roof, equipped with a long-barreled cannon extending forward. The hull is heavily armored with sloped surfaces for deflection, and the wheels are robust, designed for off-road and urban terrain. There are two visible hatches on the roof, likely for crew access, and several small details such as vents and antennae. The vehicle's design emphasizes protection and firepower, with minimal external markings or decorative elements. Its overall appearance is utilitarian, built for tactical operations in potentially hostile environments.
description: A large, eight-wheeled armored combat vehicle with a central turret and long cannon, finished in matte brown. Its angular, sloped armor and robust wheels suggest a focus on protection and mobility.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sloped armored nose, central turret, and cannon barrel pointing forward, with two front wheels visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the full length of the cannon, all four wheels on this side, and the angular hull profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back armor, rear hatches, and the absence of visible weaponry from this angle.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the turret, cannon, and four wheels, with the antenna visible at the rear.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large cannon mounted on the central turret; no other visible weapon mounts.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, sloped armor plating; angular surfaces for deflection; no visible modular or reactive panels.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid matte brown color; no visible camouflage pattern.
attribute_tire_type: Eight large, all-terrain tires with deep tread pattern; appear reinforced for heavy-duty use.
